attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INVENTORY_LOCATION_ID, 
ORGANIZATION_ID, 
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS VARCHAR(19))) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
 AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,  
-1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(CREATION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATION_DATE, 
-1 AS CREATED_BY, 
-1 AS LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
DESCRIPTION, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(DISABLE_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DISABLE_DATE, 
COALESCE(INVENTORY_LOCATION_TYPE,0) AS INVENTORY_LOCATION_TYPE,
COALESCE(PICKING_ORDER,0) AS PICKING_ORDER,
SUBINVENTORY_CODE, 
SEGMENT1, 
SEGMENT2, 
SEGMENT3, 
SEGMENT4, 
SEGMENT5, 
SEGMENT6, 
SEGMENT7, 
SEGMENT8, 
SEGMENT9, 
SEGMENT10, 
SEGMENT11, 
SEGMENT12, 
SEGMENT13, 
SEGMENT14, 
SEGMENT15, 
SEGMENT16, 
SEGMENT17, 
SEGMENT18, 
SEGMENT19, 
SEGMENT20, 
COALESCE(ENABLED_FLAG,'') AS ENABLED_FLAG, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(START_DATE_ACTIVE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_DATE_ACTIVE, 
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(END_DATE_ACTIVE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_DATE_ACTIVE, 
COALESCE(LOCATOR_STATUS, 0) AS LOCATOR_STATUS,
COALESCE(STATUS_ID,0) AS STATUS_ID,
COALESCE(INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,0) AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS REFRESH_DATETIME, 
OFFSET_NUMBER, 
PARTITION_NUMBER, 
RECORD_COUNT 
FROM 
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_MTL_ITEM_LOCATIONS
